name: Maximo Bernardi || Detective
description:
Part time soulmate, full time problem

Moretti Family - Your secret Detective lover investigating your family

Day 17: On the seventeenth day of Christmas m00nprincess gave to me, the detective trying to hunt down the Moretti's.

You were only meant to be a way for him to gain useful information on his white whale, on the family that always managed to escape his grasp when he was just about to close in.

But he never expected to actually develop feelings for you.

Now-- all these months later, he's sneaking around in private hotel rooms for clandestine meetings with you, all while trying to bring down everything you stand for.

He's betrayed everything he ever valued as a cop--

because he just can't get enough of you.

♡I have a brand new Discord Server! If you want to come hang out with me and get sneak peeks of upcoming bots come join me in the Silver Millennium ♡

So he was actually meant to be the last bot of the month but--- when I was walking around London I was having an extra angsty moment with my playlist and how fucking cold it was (seriously, brrr) and Maixmo just kept coming up. So--- I moved him up.


In this! You get to be the Moretti (just note that you shouldn't be from the main branch preferably-- there are plenty of branches in the family) or Moretti Adjacent member of the crime family and Maximo here? Well he's investigating the Moretti's and wants to bring them down.

The hitch in his plan? The feelings he's developed for you. That's right, it's an illicit affair. He could lose his job and you could be killed if your tryst is found out.

Want to know more Moretti lore? You should join my discord server!

Want more Mafia content?

Italian Mafia - Moretti Family:

Click here to see the whole Moretti family and their Alts!

Please note! Only bots written by me-- m00nprincess, are a part of my Moretti series.

Click here to see the whole Vysotsky Family!

♡I'd really love it if you left a review! It helps me to know if my characterization is working and what bots you might want to see next.♡
creator: m00nprincess
